x-enumeration-literals.name: Operational Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Terms that define day-to-day operations, partner responsibilities, and service delivery.

Comment:
Partner must provide 24/7 payment gateway services.
Bank provides customer onboarding and support.
Delivery timelines for products or services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial / Revenue Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Terms that govern payments, revenue sharing, fees, and financial responsibilities.

Comment:
Examples:
Revenue split: 70% bank / 30% partner.
Partner bears infrastructure costs.
Penalties for missed SLAs are deducted from payments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Service Level / Performance Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Terms that define measurable performance standards and expectations.
Includes: Penalty clauses for non-compliance.

Comment:

Examples:
API uptime ≥ 99.9% per month.
Maximum transaction processing time ≤ 2 seconds.
Customer support response time ≤ 24 hours.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk and Liability Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Terms that define which party is responsible for operational, financial, or regulatory risks.

Comment:

Examples:
Partner liable for data breaches originating from their systems.
Bank responsible for AML verification.
Insurance coverage requirements for partner services

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance and Regulatory Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Terms that ensure the partner meets legal, regulatory, and internal policy requirements.

Comment:

Examples:
Adherence to AML/KYC, PCI DSS, GDPR.
Mandatory reporting and audit participation.
Certification or licensing requirements.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Confidentiality and Data Protection Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Terms that protect sensitive data and define how it is handled.

Comment:

Examples:
Partner cannot share customer financial data externally.
Encryption of all data in transit and at rest.
Access restrictions and privacy policies.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Renegotiation and Renewal Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Terms governing the length of the agreement, renewal, and renegotiation.

Comment:

Examples:
Initial term: 3 years.
Renewal contingent on performance reviews.
Renegotiation triggered by regulatory or business changes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Termination and Exit Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditions under which the partnership can be ended.

Comment:

Examples:
SLA violations for three consecutive months.
Non-compliance with legal/regulatory rules.
Mutual agreement or insolvency of partner.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dispute Resolution Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Terms that define how conflicts or disagreements will be handled.

Comment:

Examples:
Mediation or arbitration procedures.
Governing law or jurisdiction.
Escalation paths for unresolved disputes.
